title: Teleporter Block
description: A mod that adds a new block called the teleporter block which teleports you to anywhere you'd like.
body:
This mod adds a new craftable block called the **'Teleporter Block'** which can teleport you to anywhere you'd like!

## The Teleporter Block
This block can be crafted by any 6 wooden slabs, 1 nether star, 1 redstone dust and 1 lever.

![Teleporter Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f0e74a5a79aab8ee48fee750303ae72783216ea.png)

## GUI
You have to enter the X, Y and Z coordinates of the place you want to travel to. You can also click the button to enter the coordinates of your last death location. And then just press the red lever button and you'll be teleported to your desired destination.

![Teleporter Block UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ac72a7320969dc06b0e54cc065b473cf119ef07.png)
